texto: Our susceptibility to myth is a world danger. Because the application of science to human behaviour has come so late the myth is regarded as less dangerous than the bacillus. It is doubtful whether such a belief is justified.
explicacao: Citação de Goeffrey Pyke sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our susceptibility to myth is a world danger. Because the application of science to human behavio…” articula reflexao, mythology, science em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como science.
